full_text:
Gong Jiao (Deguang) 龔皦 (德光)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gong Jiao (龔皦), styledDeguang (德光), was born in Ba. Became a general. Gong Jiao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
